zh.lifeSummary: 當Kerstin Persdotter Flemming於1525年出生在瑞典索德曼藍德素南瑟越時，她的父親Per Hermansson Fleming46歲，母親Elin Hansdotter Lydecke35歲。她去世於1573年12月5日在瑞典達拉納格朗亞德享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Kerstin Persdotter Flemming于1525年出生在瑞典索德曼藍德素南瑟越时，她的父亲Per Hermansson Fleming46岁，母亲Elin Hansdotter Lydecke35岁。她去世于1573年12月5日在瑞典達拉納格朗亞德享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Flemming
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle High German vlaeminc. People from Flanders spread throughout Germany, as well as England, in the Middle Ages as clothmakers and dyers.

variants.name: Fleming
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle English fleming. The word reflects a Norman French form of Old French flamanc ‘Fleming’, from the stem flam- + the ancient Germanic suffix -ing. In the Middle Ages there was considerable commercial intercourse between England and the Netherlands, particularly in the wool trade, and many Flemish weavers and dyers settled in England. This surname is also common in south and east Scotland and in Ireland, where it is sometimes found in the Gaelicized form Pléamonn.
German: variant of   Flemming  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Flaming
meanings: German (rarely Fläming): ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle High German vlaeminc. See also Flemming .
Altered form of Dutch   Vlaming  , cognate with 1 above.
English: variant of   Fleming  , cognate with 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Kerstin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Christina
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

historicEvents.title: First Full Swedish Translation of the New Testament
historicEvents.description: The first full Swedish translation of the New Testament was published in 1526.

historicEvents.title: The Protestant Reformation
historicEvents.description: The Protestant Reformation in Sweden occurred as King Gustav Vasa of Sweden, aided by his chancellor Laurentius Andreae, a Swedish Lutheran clergyman, broke ties with Rome and the Roman Catholic church in 1527.

historicEvents.title: First Full Swedish Translation of the Bible
historicEvents.description: The first full Swedish translation of the Bible, known as the Gustav Bible, was completed by Olaus Petri and Laurentius Andreae and published in 1540.

historicEvents.title: Sweden Becomes Lutheran Nation
historicEvents.description: Sweden officially declared itself a Lutheran nation in 1544.
Peace of Stettin concluded. Denmark recognized independence of Sweden. Sweden gave up claim to Norway.

en.lifeSummary: When Kerstin Persdotter Flemming was born in 1525, in Sunnansjö, Södermanland, Sweden, her father, Per Hermansson Fleming, was 46 and her mother, Elin Hansdotter Lydecke, was 35. She died on 5 December 1573, in Grangärde, Dalarna, Sweden, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Kerstin Persdotter Flemming est née en 1525, à Sunnansjö, Södermanland, Suède, son père, Per Hermansson Fleming, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Elin Hansdotter Lydecke, avait 35 ans. Elle est décédée le 5 décembre 1573, à Grangärde, Dalarna, Suède, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Kerstin Persdotter Flemming 1525 in Sunnansjö, Södermanland, Schweden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Per Hermansson Fleming 46 und ihre Mutter Elin Hansdotter Lydecke 35. Sie starb am 5. Dezember 1573 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Grangärde, Dalarna, Schweden.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Kerstin Persdotter Flemming è nata il nel 1525 nel Sunnansjö, Södermanland, Svezia, sua padre, Per Hermansson Fleming, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Elin Hansdotter Lydecke, aveva 35 anni. Morì il 5 dicembre 1573, nel Grangärde, Dalarna, Svezia, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Kerstin Persdotter Flemmingが1525年にスウェーデンスoデルマンランドスナンスジoで生まれた時，父Per Hermansson Flemingは46歳，母Elin Hansdotter Lydeckeは35歳であった。彼女は1573年12月5日にスウェーデンダラーナグラングaルドで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Kerstin Persdotter Flemming(이)가 1525년 스웨덴 스o더먼랜드 선아스jo에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Per Hermansson Fleming(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elin Hansdotter Lydecke(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1573년 12월 5일 스웨덴 다라른아 그랑a르드에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Kerstin Persdotter Flemming nasceu em 1525, em Sunnansjö, Södermanland, Suécia, seu pai, Per Hermansson Fleming, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Elin Hansdotter Lydecke, tinha 35 anos. Ela faleceu em 5 de dezembro de 1573, em Grangärde, Dalarna, Suécia, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Kerstin Persdotter Flemming родилась в 1525 г. в местности суннансджo, сoдирманланд, Швеция, её отцу по имени Per Hermansson Fleming было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Elin Hansdotter Lydecke, 35. Она умерла 5 декабря 1573 г. в местности грангaрд, даларна, Швеция в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Kerstin Persdotter Flemming nació en 1525, en Sunnansjö, Södermanland, Suecia, su papá, Per Hermansson Fleming, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Elin Hansdotter Lydecke, tenía 35 años. Murió el 5 de diciembre de 1573, en Grangärde, Dalarna, Suecia, a la edad de 48 años.
